expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and builds separated sections: "Modern grid hyperlink-style coverage must separate contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering." It then provides distinct subsections "A. Contextual-link styling checks (hyperlink-specific)" and "B. Ordinary element rendering checks (non-link)", plus "C. Separation/diagnostic checks (explicitly proving separation)".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
